features.description: Server-side health checks + threshold-triggered alerts + incident management. All tiers.
PagerDuty + Opsgenie provider drivers. Enables true on-call paging with escalation rotations. Medium + Enterprise.
Datadog provider driver. Sends monitoring events to Datadog for correlation with APM traces + logs + metrics. Medium + Enterprise.
Prometheus provider driver — pushgateway (outbound metrics) + AlertManager webhook receiver (inbound alerts from tenant's own Prometheus). Enterprise-only.
custom_script health check type + custom_metric signal type. Enables tenant-provided monitoring scripts + arbitrary metric names. Enterprise-only.
Extends health_check_runs from 7d/30d to 30d/90d. Extends monitoring_alerts from 30d/90d to 90d/1y. Extends monitoring_incidents to indefinite for P1 (postmortem archive). Enterprise-only.

P1-incident-triggered postmortem doc scaffolding + MonitoringPostmortemRequiredNotification. All tiers get a basic postmortem status column; Enterprise gets the doc scaffolding + assignment + due-date tracking.
Opt-in weekly summary of tenant SLO health: alert counts by severity, incident counts, MTTR, top 5 firing policies, top 5 unhealthy checks. Every Monday 09:00 tenant-local. All tiers.
Route monitoring alert + incident notifications to a tenant Slack channel via the CustomWebhook provider. Medium + Enterprise via monitoring_custom_webhook alias.
